headings.usage: H1-H4 in storefront. Hero banners, category titles. Use tracking-tight for larger sizes.

body.usage: Paragraphs, buttons, admin panel text, forms. High legibility.

storefront.spacing: Generous padding (p-8 to p-24). Avoid cramming elements.
storefront.grid: Bento Grid Mode A for promotional sections. Asymmetric layouts for lookbooks to create visual tension.

admin_panel.spacing: Tight and functional (p-4 to p-6) to maximize data visibility.
admin_panel.grid: Control Room Grid Mode B for dashboard KPIs.
admin_panel.structure: Fixed left sidebar, sticky top header.

buttons.primary: bg-[#B45F45] text-white rounded-none md:rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#9c4d36] tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: border border-[#B45F45] text-[#B45F45] rounded-none md:rounded-sm px-8 py-3 transition-colors hover:bg-[#F9F6F0] tracking-wide

cards.storefront: Minimalist. No heavy shadows. Flat or soft borders. Let the product image be the hero.
cards.admin: Flat white background (#FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#E5E0D8), soft radius (rounded-md).

inputs.style: Shadcn based. 1px solid border (#E5E0D8), focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#B45F45]. Flat surfaces.

hero_images.description: Indian woman in traditional jewelry - perfect for main hero banner overlay.
Dark background portrait showcasing silver jewelry - alternate high-end banner.

category_images.description: Layered gold necklaces / Everyday Luxe category.

product_images.description: Flatlay of jewelry pieces for bestsellers.
Gold jewelry on marble dish for product cards.
Silver cuban link chain product shot.

admin_placeholders.description: Data analytics visualization for dashboard overview.

design_rules.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios for text. Add aria-labels to icon buttons.
design_rules.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
design_rules.animations: Smooth hover transitions on product cards. Subtle scale up on images. Soft fade-in for page sections.
design_rules.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke-width at 1.5 for a more delicate, refined look.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS configured with the provided 'colors' object in tailwind.config.js.
Include Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond (serif) and Outfit (sans).
IMPORTANT: Write React components using .js/.jsx extensions, NOT .tsx, as specified.
Storefront and Admin Panel should have distinct layout structures but share the underlying warm, earthy brand colors.
For the storefront, lean into an editorial aesthetic: generous spacing, minimal borders, let product photography shine.
For the admin panel, use denser spacing, clearer borders, and prioritize function and data visibility.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (drawers for cart, dialogs, dropdowns) but customize them heavily to remove the default 'Vercel' look—use our warm background and border colors.
Ensure the hero image has a subtle overlay (e.g., bg-black/20 to bg-black/40) so text remains readable but the image isn't drowned out.
Always apply 'data-testid' to actionable elements (buttons, nav links, cart triggers, etc).
